_comment_top: Drop-in snippet for VS Code user or workspace settings.json. Wires GitHub Copilot Chat to read MemForge MEMORY.md files at session start. Edit paths to match your layout.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr._comment: Per-repo instructions (sits next to AGENTS.md in the same repo).
Global memory loaded for every Copilot Chat session in every repo.
Per-cwd memory; path includes USERNAME, edit accordingly.

_comment_bottom_1: VS Code does not strip _comment_* keys; remove them before saving to settings.json or VS Code will warn.
_comment_bottom_2: Some Copilot versions only support github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.useInstructionFiles. The instructions[] array landed in later versions; check Copilot docs for your version.
